message:
feat(ars): add blast radius controller with hierarchical token-bucket rate limiting

Implements ft-tkpgy.4.2: swarm → cluster → per-reflex token-bucket hierarchy
with maturity tiers (Incubating/Graduated/Veteran) and automatic promotion/demotion.
28 inline tests + 18 proptests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
